intro.paragraph1: The Halifax Kurdish Society is a community-driven organization dedicated to promoting Kurdish culture, language, and unity in Halifax. Through cultural events, education, and collaboration, we aim to strengthen the Kurdish presence in Nova Scotia.
intro.paragraph2: Join us in celebrating our heritage and building a vibrant future together.

logo.title: Our Society's logo
logo.subtitle: A Symbol of Kurdish Heritage and Our Place in Nova Scotia.
logo.description: The Kurdish (Median) cuneiform in the logo represents the word “Kurd”, with the characters corresponding to the sounds: [KU], [U], and [D] respectively. Alongside this, the narwhal petroglyph, an early Mi'kmaq carving, symbolizes Halifax and Nova Scotia, our home today. This fusion of symbols reflects both our ancestral heritage and our presence in this land, honoring the past while looking toward the future.

about.title: About Us
about.shortDescription: The Halifax Kurdish Society is a community-driven organization dedicated to promoting Kurdish culture, language, and unity in Halifax. Through cultural events, education, and collaboration, we aim to strengthen the Kurdish presence in Nova Scotia.
about.longDescription: The Halifax Kurdish Society is a community-driven organization dedicated to promoting Kurdish culture, language, and unity in Halifax. Through cultural events, education, and collaboration, we aim to strengthen the Kurdish presence in Nova Scotia. Our mission is to create a vibrant community that celebrates our heritage and fosters connections among Kurds and friends of the Kurdish culture. We believe in the power of culture to bring people together and create a sense of belonging.
about.imageCaption: A group photo of our community members at a Kurdistan flag raising in Halifax, Nova Scotia on March 21, 2025.

cards.about: The Halifax Kurdish Society is a non-profit organization dedicated to preserving and promoting the Kurdish culture and language in Halifax, Nova Scotia. We aim to create a vibrant community that celebrates our heritage and fosters connections among Kurds and friends of the Kurdish culture.
cards.events: We organize various cultural events, workshops, and educational programs to promote Kurdish culture and language. Our events are open to everyone, and we welcome all who are interested in learning about our rich heritage.
cards.committee: Our team is composed of dedicated volunteers who are passionate about promoting Kurdish culture and language. We work tirelessly to organize events, workshops, and educational programs that celebrate our heritage and foster connections within the community.
cards.goals: Our goals include promoting Kurdish culture and language, fostering community connections, and providing educational resources for those interested in learning about our heritage. We aim to create a welcoming environment for all who wish to learn about and celebrate Kurdish culture.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: The Halifax Kurdish Society respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect through our website and how we use and protect it.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: We may collect personal information that you choose to share with us, such as your name, email address, and message when you contact us.

sections.heading: How we use your information
sections.body: We use your information to respond to inquiries, share updates about our activities, and improve our website and community services.

sections.heading: Cookies and analytics
sections.body: Our website may use basic cookies or analytics tools to understand website traffic and improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: How we protect your information
sections.body: We take reasonable administrative and technical steps to protect personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.

sections.heading: Third-party links
sections.body: Our website may include links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party websites.

sections.heading: Contact us
sections.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal information, please contact the Halifax Kurdish Society.
